## Checklist

- [ ] For behavior changes, I followed the repository's required development workflow and TDD process
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change, or explained under Validation why tests are unnecessary
- [ ] The relevant builds and tests pass
- [ ] For UI changes, I verified the change with E2E tests
- [ ] I updated `docs/specs/`, `docs/design/`, or `docs/reference/` where needed
- [ ] For new design decisions, I added an ADR
